title: The Agentic Robot Motion Layer
summary: General-purpose physical intelligence models enable a broader robotics application layer for real-world industrial deployments.
body: We describe an application layer that bridges foundation robot models and deployment-specific interfaces.
The stack provides shared abstractions for task composition, runtime monitoring, and safety constraints.
This layer enables rapid adaptation from research prototypes to production robot workflows.
